languages.text: "Подобным оружием располагает и враг, но его владелец неминуемо стал бы для нас первейшей целью. И уж точно мы не позволили бы ему дойти до заставы. Любопытно".
languages.translation_comment:
Мы нашли не все улики
Не Играет DL_GaprakMask
Стартует Obj1_WhereIsGaprak

traits.locale_text: "Подобным оружием располагает и враг, но его владелец неминуемо стал бы для нас первейшей целью. И уж точно мы не позволили бы ему дойти до заставы. Любопытно".

languages.translation_comment:
Мы нашли не все улики
Не Играет DL_GaprakMask
Стартует Obj1_WhereIsGaprak

languages.text: "The enemy also possesses such a weapon, but its owner would have been an immediate target. And besides, there is no way he would have been allowed to reach the outpost. Curious."
languages.original_text: "Подобным оружием располагает и враг, но его владелец неминуемо стал бы для нас первейшей целью. И уж точно мы не позволили бы ему дойти до заставы. Любопытно".

traits.locale_text: "The enemy also possesses such a weapon, but its owner would have been an immediate target. And besides, there is no way he would have been allowed to reach the outpost. Curious."
"The enemy also possesses such a weapon, but its owner would have been an immediate target. And besides, there is no way he would have been allowed to reach the outpost. Curious."
"The enemy also possesses such a weapon, but its owner would have been an immediate target. And besides, there is no way he would have been allowed to reach the outpost. Curious."

languages.text: “敌人手里也有这样的武器，不过持有者会立刻成为靶子。更何况，他根本不可能靠近前哨。这就奇怪了。”
languages.original_text: "The enemy also possesses such a weapon, but its owner would have been an immediate target. And besides, there is no way he would have been allowed to reach the outpost. Curious."

traits.locale_text: “敌人手里也有这样的武器，不过持有者会立刻成为靶子。更何况，他根本不可能靠近前哨。这就奇怪了。”

languages.text: « L'adversaire aussi possède une arme de cette catégorie, mais son propriétaire aurait été abattu sans sommation. Sans compter qu'il ne serait jamais parvenu à atteindre l'avant-poste. Curieux. »
languages.original_text: "The enemy also possesses such a weapon, but its owner would have been an immediate target. And besides, there is no way he would have been allowed to reach the outpost. Curious."

traits.locale_text: « L'adversaire aussi possède une arme de cette catégorie, mais son propriétaire aurait été abattu sans sommation. Sans compter qu'il ne serait jamais parvenu à atteindre l'avant-poste. Curieux. »

languages.text: "Düşmanda da böyle bir silah vardı ancak sahibinin anında apaçık hedef olması gerekirdi. Üstelik karakola ulaşmasına imkân yok. İlginç."
languages.original_text: "The enemy also possesses such a weapon, but its owner would have been an immediate target. And besides, there is no way he would have been allowed to reach the outpost. Curious."

traits.locale_text: "Düşmanda da böyle bir silah vardı ancak sahibinin anında apaçık hedef olması gerekirdi. Üstelik karakola ulaşmasına imkân yok. İlginç."

languages.text: «El enemigo también posee un arma similar, pero su dueño habría sido un objetivo inmediato. Además, es imposible que le hubieran permitido llegar hasta el puesto avanzado. Curioso».
languages.original_text: "The enemy also possesses such a weapon, but its owner would have been an immediate target. And besides, there is no way he would have been allowed to reach the outpost. Curious."

traits.locale_text: «El enemigo también posee un arma similar, pero su dueño habría sido un objetivo inmediato. Además, es imposible que le hubieran permitido llegar hasta el puesto avanzado. Curioso».

languages.text: "Auch der Feind besitzt eine solche Waffe, aber ihr Besitzer wäre ein unmittelbares Ziel gewesen. Abgesehen davon hätte er den Außenposten niemals erreichen können. Eigenartig."
languages.original_text: "The enemy also possesses such a weapon, but its owner would have been an immediate target. And besides, there is no way he would have been allowed to reach the outpost. Curious."

traits.locale_text: "Auch der Feind besitzt eine solche Waffe, aber ihr Besitzer wäre ein unmittelbares Ziel gewesen. Abgesehen davon hätte er den Außenposten niemals erreichen können. Eigenartig."

languages.text: 「敵にも同じような兵器があるが、その所有者は即座の標的になるだろう。それに、彼は要塞にたどり着くことはなかっただろう。興味深い。」
languages.original_text: "The enemy also possesses such a weapon, but its owner would have been an immediate target. And besides, there is no way he would have been allowed to reach the outpost. Curious."

traits.locale_text: 「敵にも同じような兵器があるが、その所有者は即座の標的になるだろう。それに、彼は要塞にたどり着くことはなかっただろう。興味深い。」
